name: AI Blog Automation for WordPress
description: Generate SEO-optimized blog posts with Claude AI and publish them directly to WordPress. Provide a topic and keywords, and the AI writes a complete blog post with title, meta description, and structured content.

source.originalName: Content farming - : AI-powered blog automation for WordPress

wordpressSite.description: WordPress site domain (e.g. 'mysite.wordpress.com' or site ID)

topic.description: Blog post topic (e.g. '10 Best Practices for Remote Work in 2026')

wordCount.description: Target word count for the blog post
